statement.en: Adjusting to Life with a Left Ventricular Assist Device (LVAD): The Mediating Effects of Self-Compassion, Psychological Flexibility and Psychological Inflexibility on the Relationship Between LVAD Acceptance and Anxiety and Depression.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional 2026-dated research manuscript (preprint status indicator). The axiom proposes a mediation model linking LVAD acceptance → psychological flexibility/inflexibility/self-compassion → anxiety/depression outcomes. The causal structure is theoretically coherent but requires empirical validation. The manuscript category is misclassified as cs.AI when it belongs to clinical psychology/medicine. Status: not yet peer-reviewed, validation pending.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 心臓の機械を受け入れることは、自分への優しさと柔軟性があるほど、不安を溶かし去る。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 剛い心臓の周りを、優しさと柔軟性の波が包み込み、受け入れの中心へ螺旋する。
